r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Heart disease is caused by high cholesterol clogging arteries. The solution is either lifestyle changes (diet, exercise, statins) or bypass surgery to clear blocked arteries.
relatability_triggers: The harmless-looking white powder you're looking at could have been a death sentence for John - and a catastrophe for his grieving family.
Existing belief: Heart disease is caused by high cholesterol clogging arteries. The solution is either lifestyle changes (diet, exercise, statins) or bypass surgery to clear blocked arteries.

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: EDTA Oral Chelation Therapy: EDTA (ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid) is an amino acid similar to household vinegar. It 'chelates' (from Greek word for 'claw') rogue calcium that glues cholesterol plaque to artery walls. Once the calcium 'glue' is removed, plaque dissolves and is flushed out through the kidneys. The FDA approves EDTA for use in baby food. 1,823 medical studies prove it's up to 82% effective at eliminating rogue calcium from plaque.
mechanism_proof_points: Dr. Linus Pauling (Two-Time Nobel Prize Winner) endorsement
FDA and USDA approve for foods - approved for baby food
Up to 82% effective in clinical studies
unique_differentiators: The only FDA-approved food additive proven in 1,823 studies to dissolve artery plaque - endorsed by a Two-Time Nobel Prize winning scientist. Unlike IV chelation ($3,000), you can take it orally at home for 23 cents. Unlike statins, it addresses the root cause (calcium glue) not just cholesterol. Unlike surgery, it clears your entire circulatory system, not just one spot.

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Heart disease is caused by high cholesterol clogging arteries. The solution is either lifestyle changes (diet, exercise, statins) or bypass surgery to clear blocked arteries.
three_part_structure.what_it_really_is: The real problem is rogue calcium that acts as 'glue' binding cholesterol plaque to artery walls. Cholesterol alone wouldn't stick - it's the calcium that makes plaque deadly and immovable. This calcium glue hardens throughout your circulatory system.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Statins lower cholesterol but don't touch the calcium glue. Bypass surgery only clears one spot while plaque continues building everywhere else. Diet and exercise can't remove calcium that's already cemented to artery walls. You need something that specifically chelates (claws away) that calcium - and EDTA is the only FDA-approved substance proven to do it.

villain_profile.villain_motivation: Heart surgeons push expensive bypass surgery ($100,000+) and never mention 23-cent EDTA because there's no profit in affordable solutions. The medical establishment has known about chelation for decades but suppresses it because it threatens their revenue model.
villain_profile.villain_evidence: Headline explicitly states 'HEART SURGEONS NEVER TELL YOU ABOUT' - implying deliberate withholding. Despite 1,823 studies, Two-Time Nobel Prize endorsement, FDA approval, and 1.5 million patients treated, EDTA chelation remains little-known outside alternative medicine circles.

mechanism.name: EDTA Oral Chelation Therapy
mechanism.explanation_text: EDTA (ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid) is an amino acid similar to household vinegar. It 'chelates' (from Greek word for 'claw') rogue calcium that glues cholesterol plaque to artery walls. Once the calcium 'glue' is removed, plaque dissolves and is flushed out through the kidneys. The FDA approves EDTA for use in baby food. 1,823 medical studies prove it's up to 82% effective at eliminating rogue calcium from plaque.
credibility_anchors: Dr. Linus Pauling (Two-Time Nobel Prize Winner) endorsement
FDA and USDA approve for foods - approved for baby food
Up to 82% effective in clinical studies
mechanism.uniqueness_claim: The only FDA-approved food additive proven in 1,823 studies to dissolve artery plaque - endorsed by a Two-Time Nobel Prize winning scientist. Unlike IV chelation ($3,000), you can take it orally at home for 23 cents. Unlike statins, it addresses the root cause (calcium glue) not just cholesterol. Unlike surgery, it clears your entire circulatory system, not just one spot.

e5_mechanism_type.explanation: EDTA chelation therapy exists in medical literature and has been used intravenously for decades. This is E3 because it reframes the ROOT CAUSE (not cholesterol but calcium glue) and the DELIVERY METHOD (oral instead of IV). The mechanism isn't new, but framing calcium as the 'glue' that makes plaque deadly, identifying EDTA as the specific calcium chelator, and offering an oral form for 23¢ vs $3,000 IV therapy is a sophistication-appropriate reframe. It takes known science and makes it accessible, affordable, and enemy-focused (heart surgeons hiding it).
e5_mechanism_type.market_sophistication_fit: Stage 3-4: Market knows about heart disease, cholesterol, statins, bypass surgery. This reframes the problem (it's the calcium, not just cholesterol) and identifies a counter-intuitive solution (something FDA-approved for baby food can dissolve plaque) while creating an enemy (doctors hiding affordable solution).

The mechanism is so effective (82%, 1,823 studies, Nobel Prize endorsed) and so affordable (23¢) that its suppression is proof of villainy.

proof_inventory.proof_sequence: Opens with dramatic visual proof (white powder that was deadly plaque) and emotional testimonial (John's life saved). Immediately establishes authority with Two-Time Nobel Prize endorsement. Layers in massive study count (1,823) and effectiveness data (82%). Adds social proof (1,526 doctors, 1.5 million patients). Reinforces credibility with FDA/USDA approval for baby food. Explains mechanism with logical step-by-step proof. Demonstrates value with dramatic cost comparison (23¢ vs $3,000). Throughout, uses enemy framing (heart surgeons hiding it) to explain why something so proven isn't common knowledge. Closes with simplicity proof (take at home, no surgery needed).

metadata.big_idea_name: 23¢ EDTA Oral Chelation - The Calcium Glue Solution Heart Surgeons Hide
metadata.central_concept: Heart disease isn't just about cholesterol - it's about the rogue calcium that acts as 'glue' binding cholesterol plaque to your artery walls. EDTA (ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid), an FDA-approved amino acid similar to vinegar, 'chelates' (claws away) that calcium glue, allowing plaque to dissolve and flush out through your kidneys. Endorsed by Two-Time Nobel Prize winner Dr. Linus Pauling, proven in 1,823 medical studies to be 82% effective, and prescribed by 1,526 U.S. doctors to 1.5 million patients. For just 23¢ per dose, you can get all the benefits of $3,000 IV chelation therapy at home - dissolving plaque throughout your entire circulatory system and potentially eliminating the need for bypass surgery. Heart surgeons never tell you about this because there's no profit in a 23-cent solution.
